# Third-Party Integrations (Stubs)

This folder contains placeholder files for upstreams not yet present in the workspace. Download and add the latest releases here for:

- Lucaslhm
- DarkFlippers
- Multi_Fuzzer
- C5Lab
- projectZero
- 0dayCTF/Flipper

Each integration must include:
- Source code or payloads
- License/attribution
- Manifest (if applicable)
